TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mapacekilay_nu_asuni_aayam_alain, title = mapacekilay_nu_asuni_aayam_alain, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mapacekilay_nu_asuni_aayam_alain} }

S.FORM: mapacekilay nu asuni aayam alainÁćÖŚ≠źŤĘęťõěť≥īŤĀ≤ŚöáťÜí... cacay ku mapuut utiih, widasa u katinenhan a kawaw, anu maydih, anu cuwa a utiih a puut mala palcelangay mulakuwit tu udip. . tu cacay a demiad, ukilakilanga nu sakakaay u lain, tayni nuayawa nu malataw "mikukay kaku tu nipabinamu tu kapahay a udip icelangay a wayway, kiyu hatini t uku icelanga aku, sisa itani kaku I kilakilangan u sakakaay kaku mamuwanay tu tiniay kilakilabgnanay.śúČšłÄŚ§©, ." tengil han nu malataw tawasa sakamusa "ayda tayni kisu cay kawinian ku kawaw isu cay haw! adihan mahida idaay ku kawaw nu misucay haw! saahemaw sa ku suni nida lain sakamu sa " amu u malataw matineng takuwan ! ayda tatenga idaw ku kawaw aku maydih mu lunguc tu kawaw. kanaha tu kapah ku udiudipan naku, nika tudedemiad katukuhan nuayam mu kuku', matawid mapacekil kaku nu suni nu ayam. . Malataw! milunguc kaku tisuwan pabii' kaku tu icelanh , amanatu pabahal takuwa tu suni nu ayam !" tawa han nu malataw sakamusa"pikilimi tu tula, kaph ku nipatubelinida, manamuh kida iain maduba tu tayda isauwac mikilim tu tula cayhenay pakaadih tu tula, matengil tu ku nasadipaan nu sumi nu tula "pung pung" sa masuni. "Á†įÁ†į"ťüŅŤĀ≤. misakalamkam kida lain pasayda I tula maduba, maadih nida malinges kida tula tuktuk sa tu kuku. palita han nu iain ku tula: mahica kisu kahatini t uku linges nu balucu' ?" yatila saicelangsa mulingaling tu tangila tanu tuwasa "kalingesan ku likes maydih tu micumud I tangila aku, pakacalengt tu tangila aku sa". laliw satu kida lain tu tula, datengsatu "alaw hatiniay katabaki nu udip a tula metalaw tu adidi'ay a likes, wicana hwnay ku kalahudan aku sa? u ayam cacay a demiad kinacacay a mu kuku', ulikes han tu sademiad sa micalilaw. anumahini sa, aku tu waca ku daesuay, miculil kida lain sudukud sa miadih tida mutuktukay tu kuku' a tula, datengsa "yamalataw papiadih takuwa tu tulasa a wayway sa, akay maydih musakamu takuwan cumacuma makalikeluh aca tu mikawaay a kawa, nika caay pakaedap tu duma a tademaw. anu mahinasa, aku tu waca tu waku, sisa anu ayaw anu mu kuku' ku ayamsa, palu pacekilay ku ayam han tu, anu hini ku nidateng, mu kuku' ku ayam pakay ni takuwan u kapahhay tu,?" dihekuay a sapitulunśļęť¶®śŹźÁ§ļ: niculilan nu maudipay , anu mahicahica kapah ku culil, anu adidi' ku likeluh tu laesusay a kaea, mananam silahud kiya mahini ku paudipay takuwan sa, , milunguc tu paudipay pabii kaku tu icelang sayadahen sa tu milunguc, edapen kaku palakuwit tu mikawaay sa, nika tatenga, upaudipay palusinteb tu nayay ku tini' mahida yalain atu tula malecad, tudedemiad idaw ku utiih idaw ku tatengaay a nilacul. .
S.PHON: mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj nu asuni aajam ar~…ĺain********... ¶a ¶aj ku mapuut utiińß, widasa u katin…ônńßan a kawaw, anu majdińß, anu ¶uwa a utiińß a puut mar~…ĺa par~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mur~…ĺakuwit tu udip. . tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, ukir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča nu sakakaaj u r~…ĺain, tajni nuajawa nu mar~…ĺataw "mikukaj kaku tu nipabinamu tu kapańßaj a udip i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a wajwaj, kiju ńßatini t uku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇča aku, sisa itani kaku i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan u sakakaaj kaku mamuwanaj tu tiniaj kir~…ĺakir~…ĺabgnanaj.***, ." t…ôŇčir~…ĺ ńßan nu mar~…ĺataw tawasa sakamusa "ajda tajni kisu ¶aj kawinian ku kawaw isu ¶aj ńßaw! adińßan mańßida idaaj ku kawaw nu misu ¶aj ńßaw! saańß…ômaw sa ku suni nida r~…ĺain sakamu sa " amu u mar~…ĺataw matin…ôŇč takuwan ! ajda tat…ôŇča idaw ku kawaw aku majdińß mu r~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu kawaw. kanańßa tu kapańß ku udiudipan naku, nika tud…ôd…ômiad katukuńßan nuajam mu kuku Ē~ °, matawid mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ kaku nu suni nu ajam. . mar~…ĺataw! mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ kaku tisuwan pabii Ē~ ° kaku tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺanńß , amanatu pabańßar~…ĺ takuwa tu suni nu ajam !" tawa ńßan nu mar~…ĺataw sakamusa"pikir~…ĺimi tu tur~…ĺa, kapńß ku nipatub…ôr~…ĺinida, manamuńß kida iain maduba tu tajda isauwa ¶ mikir~…ĺim tu tur~…ĺa ¶ajńß…ônaj pakaadińß tu tur~…ĺa, mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ku nasadipaan nu sumi nu tur~…ĺa "puŇč puŇč" sa masuni. "**"**. misakar~…ĺamkam kida r~…ĺain pasajda i tur~…ĺa maduba, maadińß nida mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs kida tur~…ĺa tuktuk sa tu kuku. par~…ĺita ńßan nu iain ku tur~…ĺa: mańßi ¶a kisu kańßatini t uku r~…ĺiŇč…ôs nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ?" jatir~…ĺa sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčsa mur~…ĺiŇčar~…ĺiŇč tu taŇčir~…ĺa tanu tuwasa "kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan ku r~…ĺik…ôs majdińß tu mi ¶umud i taŇčir~…ĺa aku, paka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇčt tu taŇčir~…ĺa aku sa". r~…ĺar~…ĺiw satu kida r~…ĺain tu tur~…ĺa, dat…ôŇčsatu "ar~…ĺaw ńßatiniaj katabaki nu udip a tur~…ĺa m…ôtar~…ĺaw tu adidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôs, wi ¶ana ńßwnaj ku kar~…ĺańßudan aku sa? u ajam ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad kina ¶a ¶aj a mu kuku Ē~ °, ur~…ĺik…ôs ńßan tu sad…ômiad sa mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw. anumańßini sa, aku tu wa ¶a ku da…ôsuaj, mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kida r~…ĺain sudukud sa miadińß tida mutuktukaj tu kuku Ē~ ° a tur~…ĺa, dat…ôŇčsa "jamar~…ĺataw papiadińß takuwa tu tur~…ĺasa a wajwaj sa, akaj majdińß musakamu takuwan ¶uma ¶uma makar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶a tu mikawaaj a kawa, nika ¶aaj paka…ôdap tu duma a tad…ômaw. anu mańßinasa, aku tu wa ¶a tu waku, sisa anu ajaw anu mu kuku Ē~ ° ku ajamsa, par~…ĺu pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj ku ajam ńßan tu, anu ńßini ku nidat…ôŇč, mu kuku Ē~ ° ku ajam pakaj ni takuwan u kapańßńßaj tu,?" dińß…ôkuaj a sapitur~…ĺun****: ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu maudipaj , anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, anu adidi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu r~…ĺa…ôsusaj a ka…ôa, mananam sir~…ĺańßud kija mańßini ku paudipaj takuwan sa, , mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu paudipaj pabii kaku tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sajadańß…ôn sa tu mir~…ĺuŇču ¶, …ôdap…ôn kaku par~…ĺakuwit tu mikawaaj sa, nika tat…ôŇča, upaudipaj par~…ĺusint…ôb tu najaj ku tini Ē~ ° mańßida jar~…ĺain atu tur~…ĺa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tud…ôd…ômiad idaw ku utiińß idaw ku tat…ôŇčaaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ. .
S.FORM: mapacekilay nu asuni aayam alainÁćÖŚ≠źŤĘęťõěť≥īŤĀ≤ŚöáťÜí... cacay ku mapuut utiih, widasa u katinenhan a kawaw, anu maydih, anu cuwa a utiih a puut mala palcelangay mulakuwit tu udip. . tu cacay a demiad, ukilakilanga nu sakakaay u lain, tayni nuayawa nu malataw "mikukay kaku tu nipabinamu tu kapahay a udip icelangay a wayway, kiyu hatini t uku icelanga aku, sisa itani kaku I kilakilangan u sakakaay kaku mamuwanay tu tiniay kilakilabgnanay.śúČšłÄŚ§©, ." tengil han nu malataw tawasa sakamusa "ayda tayni kisu cay kawinian ku kawaw isu cay haw! adihan mahida idaay ku kawaw nu misucay haw! saahemaw sa ku suni nida lain sakamu sa " amu u malataw matineng takuwan ! ayda tatenga idaw ku kawaw aku maydih mu lunguc tu kawaw. kanaha tu kapah ku udiudipan naku, nika tudedemiad katukuhan nuayam mu kuku', matawid mapacekil kaku nu suni nu ayam. . Malataw! milunguc kaku tisuwan pabii' kaku tu icelanh , amanatu pabahal takuwa tu suni nu ayam !" tawa han nu malataw sakamusa"pikilimi tu tula, kaph ku nipatubelinida, manamuh kida iain maduba tu tayda isauwac mikilim tu tula cayhenay pakaadih tu tula, matengil tu ku nasadipaan nu sumi nu tula "pung pung" sa masuni. "Á†įÁ†į"ťüŅŤĀ≤. misakalamkam kida lain pasayda I tula maduba, maadih nida malinges kida tula tuktuk sa tu kuku. palita han nu iain ku tula: mahica kisu kahatini t uku linges nu balucu' ?" yatila saicelangsa mulingaling tu tangila tanu tuwasa "kalingesan ku likes maydih tu micumud I tangila aku, pakacalengt tu tangila aku sa". laliw satu kida lain tu tula, datengsatu "alaw hatiniay katabaki nu udip a tula metalaw tu adidi'ay a likes, wicana hwnay ku kalahudan aku sa? u ayam cacay a demiad kinacacay a mu kuku', ulikes han tu sademiad sa micalilaw. anumahini sa, aku tu waca ku daesuay, miculil kida lain sudukud sa miadih tida mutuktukay tu kuku' a tula, datengsa "yamalataw papiadih takuwa tu tulasa a wayway sa, akay maydih musakamu takuwan cumacuma makalikeluh aca tu mikawaay a kawa, nika caay pakaedap tu duma a tademaw. anu mahinasa, aku tu waca tu waku, sisa anu ayaw anu mu kuku' ku ayamsa, palu pacekilay ku ayam han tu, anu hini ku nidateng, mu kuku' ku ayam pakay ni takuwan u kapahhay tu,?" dihekuay a sapitulunśļęť¶®śŹźÁ§ļ: niculilan nu maudipay , anu mahicahica kapah ku culil, anu adidi' ku likeluh tu laesusay a kaea, mananam silahud kiya mahini ku paudipay takuwan sa, , milunguc tu paudipay pabii kaku tu icelang sayadahen sa tu milunguc, edapen kaku palakuwit tu mikawaay sa, nika tatenga, upaudipay palusinteb tu nayay ku tini' mahida yalain atu tula malecad, tudedemiad idaw ku utiih idaw ku tatengaay a nilacul. .
S.PHON: mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj nu asuni aajam ar~…ĺain********... ¶a ¶aj ku mapuut utiińß, widasa u katin…ônńßan a kawaw, anu majdińß, anu ¶uwa a utiińß a puut mar~…ĺa par~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mur~…ĺakuwit tu udip. . tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, ukir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča nu sakakaaj u r~…ĺain, tajni nuajawa nu mar~…ĺataw "mikukaj kaku tu nipabinamu tu kapańßaj a udip i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a wajwaj, kiju ńßatini t uku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇča aku, sisa itani kaku i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan u sakakaaj kaku mamuwanaj tu tiniaj kir~…ĺakir~…ĺabgnanaj.***, ." t…ôŇčir~…ĺ ńßan nu mar~…ĺataw tawasa sakamusa "ajda tajni kisu ¶aj kawinian ku kawaw isu ¶aj ńßaw! adińßan mańßida idaaj ku kawaw nu misu ¶aj ńßaw! saańß…ômaw sa ku suni nida r~…ĺain sakamu sa " amu u mar~…ĺataw matin…ôŇč takuwan ! ajda tat…ôŇča idaw ku kawaw aku majdińß mu r~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu kawaw. kanańßa tu kapańß ku udiudipan naku, nika tud…ôd…ômiad katukuńßan nuajam mu kuku Ē~ °, matawid mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ kaku nu suni nu ajam. . mar~…ĺataw! mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ kaku tisuwan pabii Ē~ ° kaku tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺanńß , amanatu pabańßar~…ĺ takuwa tu suni nu ajam !" tawa ńßan nu mar~…ĺataw sakamusa"pikir~…ĺimi tu tur~…ĺa, kapńß ku nipatub…ôr~…ĺinida, manamuńß kida iain maduba tu tajda isauwa ¶ mikir~…ĺim tu tur~…ĺa ¶ajńß…ônaj pakaadińß tu tur~…ĺa, mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ku nasadipaan nu sumi nu tur~…ĺa "puŇč puŇč" sa masuni. "**"**. misakar~…ĺamkam kida r~…ĺain pasajda i tur~…ĺa maduba, maadińß nida mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs kida tur~…ĺa tuktuk sa tu kuku. par~…ĺita ńßan nu iain ku tur~…ĺa: mańßi ¶a kisu kańßatini t uku r~…ĺiŇč…ôs nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ?" jatir~…ĺa sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčsa mur~…ĺiŇčar~…ĺiŇč tu taŇčir~…ĺa tanu tuwasa "kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan ku r~…ĺik…ôs majdińß tu mi ¶umud i taŇčir~…ĺa aku, paka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇčt tu taŇčir~…ĺa aku sa". r~…ĺar~…ĺiw satu kida r~…ĺain tu tur~…ĺa, dat…ôŇčsatu "ar~…ĺaw ńßatiniaj katabaki nu udip a tur~…ĺa m…ôtar~…ĺaw tu adidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôs, wi ¶ana ńßwnaj ku kar~…ĺańßudan aku sa? u ajam ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad kina ¶a ¶aj a mu kuku Ē~ °, ur~…ĺik…ôs ńßan tu sad…ômiad sa mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw. anumańßini sa, aku tu wa ¶a ku da…ôsuaj, mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kida r~…ĺain sudukud sa miadińß tida mutuktukaj tu kuku Ē~ ° a tur~…ĺa, dat…ôŇčsa "jamar~…ĺataw papiadińß takuwa tu tur~…ĺasa a wajwaj sa, akaj majdińß musakamu takuwan ¶uma ¶uma makar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶a tu mikawaaj a kawa, nika ¶aaj paka…ôdap tu duma a tad…ômaw. anu mańßinasa, aku tu wa ¶a tu waku, sisa anu ajaw anu mu kuku Ē~ ° ku ajamsa, par~…ĺu pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj ku ajam ńßan tu, anu ńßini ku nidat…ôŇč, mu kuku Ē~ ° ku ajam pakaj ni takuwan u kapańßńßaj tu,?" dińß…ôkuaj a sapitur~…ĺun****: ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu maudipaj , anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, anu adidi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu r~…ĺa…ôsusaj a ka…ôa, mananam sir~…ĺańßud kija mańßini ku paudipaj takuwan sa, , mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu paudipaj pabii kaku tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sajadańß…ôn sa tu mir~…ĺuŇču ¶, …ôdap…ôn kaku par~…ĺakuwit tu mikawaaj sa, nika tat…ôŇča, upaudipaj par~…ĺusint…ôb tu najaj ku tini Ē~ ° mańßida jar~…ĺain atu tur~…ĺa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tud…ôd…ômiad idaw ku utiińß idaw ku tat…ôŇčaaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ. .
